title: Drive Context Pack
description: Knowledge for shared drive assets, access controls, linked folders, and workspace document visibility.

objects.name: Drive Asset
objects.description: A linked document, folder, or workspace resource visible through Metis.

available_actions.description: Evaluate workspace folder and linked document visibility for a requested actor.

diagnostics.purpose: Detect missing ACLs, stale group propagation, or unlinked workspace folders.
